_publications._publicationTitle: Machine Learning of Allosteric Effects: The Analysis of Ligand-Induced Dynamics to Predict Functional Effects in TRAP1.

_contextSnippet: The average accuracy in each validation fold varies between 66.7 and 94.9%, with the discriminative models outperforming the generative ones in the internal validation.
details: Generated MD simulations that enabled ML models to achieve 66.7-94.9% average accuracy in cross-validation for classifying TRAP1 allosteric states
